svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Variables and Data Types</text>
  
  <!-- Variable Container -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Variable
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Assignment Arrow -->
  <path d="M180 80 L200 80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="200 80,195 75,195 85" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  
  <!-- Data Types Container -->
  <rect x="210" y="50" width="160" height="180" fill="#64B5F6" rx="8" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="290" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Data Types
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- String Type -->
  <rect x="230" y="90" width="120" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="290" y="110" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    String
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Number Type -->
  <rect x="230" y="130" width="120" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="290" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Number
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Boolean Type -->
  <rect x="230" y="170" width="120" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="290" y="190" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Boolean
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Examples -->
  <text x="210" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-style="italic" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Examples: name = "Alice", age = 30, isStudent = true
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
